title: Gemini Canvas Tutorial: How to Use Google's Most Underrated AI Tool
summary: Gemini Canvas is Google's generative tool that builds working websites, no-code apps, dashboards, and audio podcasts from natural language prompts within the Gemini interface. The tutorial covers six progressive levels of capability from document editing to advanced multi-tool combinations.
writeup: This tutorial from AI Master covers Gemini Canvas, Google's generative tool inside the Gemini interface that turns natural language prompts into working websites, no-code apps, dashboards, and audio podcasts. It walks through six progressive levels of capability, starting with document editing and building up to advanced combinations of multiple tools. The throughline is showing how prompts alone can produce functional outputs rather than just text.
